ai_agent.role: Central material hub — receiving, quality control, FIFO stock rotation, distribution to job sites, and reorder point monitoring

staff.name: Klauser Silva (Seu Clauser)
staff.role: Warehouse Manager — physical stock control, receiving, QC inspection, Zorro Sales Orders, material distribution, FIFO rotation, draft handling

core_knowledge.description: Verify delivery against PO (type, quantity, condition), inspect for damage, sign delivery receipt, register in Zorro, notify Compras. Rejection workflow includes photography, partial acceptance, and immediate Compras notification.
First In First Out rotation for all stocked materials. Critical for perishable or time-sensitive items (cement, drywall). Older stock dispatched before newer arrivals.

Every material exit creates a Zorro Sales Order tied to a house number. Clauser uses draft SOs to separate/reserve materials before formal dispatch. Drafts are not confirmed until dispatch occurs, creating tracking uncertainty.

Safety stock: 2-week buffer for critical materials (concrete, lumber, rebar, blocks). Increases to 3-week buffer during peak season (March-June). Automated monitoring via set_reorder_point tool triggers Compras alerts.
Each delivery tagged with project/house number. Staging areas organized by active project. Priority: active construction phase > pre-staging > general stock.
Stocked (full warehouse cycle), Quoted (requires vendor quotation, tracked via PO), By Sub (provided by subcontractor, bypasses warehouse).

daily_workflows.name: Morning Routine
steps: Review incoming deliveries scheduled for today from Compras delivery calendar
Check overnight stock alerts (items below reorder point)
Prepare outgoing pick lists for scheduled dispatches
critical_decisions: Prioritizing dispatch when multiple houses need same material

daily_workflows.name: Midday Operations
steps: Process receipts for morning deliveries — update Zorro stock levels
Execute material dispatches to job sites per Scheduling requests
Handle walk-in requests from field supervisors (urgent material needs)
critical_decisions: Approving urgent field requests vs maintaining scheduled allocations

daily_workflows.name: End of Day Reconciliation
steps: Reconcile Zorro Sales Orders against physical dispatch log
Flag discrepancies (missing exits, unconfirmed drafts, quantity mismatches)
Update reorder status — notify Compras of items approaching threshold
Secure warehouse and update next-day delivery schedule

daily_workflows.name: Assignment-to-Takeoff Reconciliation
steps: Check materials assigned to specific houses against takeoff specifications
Flag discrepancies to Compras (Brenda) for resolution
critical_decisions: Identifying when more material was sent than takeoff calls for

features_used: Stock Levels — view cumulative stock requirements
Material Purchases — track POs and delivery status

handoffs.data_exchanged: PO details, delivery schedule, material specs
handoffs.impact: Warehouse prepares receiving bay and QC checklist

handoffs.trigger: Material request 48 hours before phase start
handoffs.data_exchanged: Pick list with house number, material type, quantities needed
handoffs.impact: Materials must be staged and ready for dispatch

handoffs.trigger: Stock falls below reorder point or delivery discrepancy found
handoffs.data_exchanged: Reorder alerts, receipt confirmations, discrepancy reports
handoffs.impact: Triggers replenishment orders or supplier dispute resolution

handoffs.data_exchanged: Zorro Sales Order data, per-house material distribution records
handoffs.impact: Enables accurate cost-per-house calculation for financial closing

pain_points.description: Clauser cannot autonomously validate incoming shipments against PO details or takeoff quantities — depends on Brenda for discrepancy resolution
pain_points.current_workaround: Flag discrepancies to Compras and wait for response
pain_points.proposed_solution: Give warehouse read access to takeoff data for independent validation

pain_points.description: Drafts in Zorro create tracking uncertainty — materials separated but not formally dispatched
pain_points.current_workaround: Compras filters including drafts when reconciling
pain_points.proposed_solution: Auto-confirm drafts after 24 hours or require same-day confirmation

pain_points.description: Confirmed houses sometimes show missing exit records in Zorro during closing
pain_points.proposed_solution: Automated alerts when house enters closing phase with incomplete exit records

tribal_knowledge.description: Clauser knows which houses are high priority based on construction phase, supervisor urgency, and upcoming inspection schedules. This informal priority system is not documented anywhere.
tribal_knowledge.risk_if_lost: New warehouse staff would dispatch materials without understanding construction priority

tribal_knowledge.description: Clauser knows which suppliers deliver reliably, which frequently short-ship, and which require special receiving procedures (e.g., trusses need crane, concrete needs immediate pour coordination).
tribal_knowledge.risk_if_lost: Receiving errors and site coordination failures

training_curriculum.quiz_coverage: Receiving flow, QC checks, Zorro data entry, rejection escalation
Buffer calculations, critical material list, notification triggers

compliance_requirements.requirement: All material exits must have a Zorro Sales Order with house number
compliance_requirements.regulation: Internal policy — cost-plus transparency per CEO directive
compliance_requirements.verification: Daily reconciliation of Zorro SOs vs physical dispatch log

compliance_requirements.requirement: Materials must match PO specifications before acceptance
compliance_requirements.regulation: Florida Building Code — approved materials per plans
compliance_requirements.verification: Visual QC inspection on receiving with photo documentation for rejections

key_metrics.target: >98% of deliveries match PO on first check
key_metrics.measurement: Weekly count of discrepancies vs total deliveries

key_metrics.target: 100% of scheduled dispatches completed same day
key_metrics.measurement: Daily count of fulfilled vs pending dispatch requests

key_metrics.target: 0 stock-outs for critical materials (concrete, lumber, rebar, blocks)
